name: @centraid/tunnel
description: Phone ↔ desktop transport: HTTP tunneled over iroh p2p QUIC (dumbpipe pattern). The desktop accepts connections from a device-key allowlist and forwards tunneled requests to its loopback gateway; the phone runs a localhost proxy so WebView subresources, ES-module imports, and EventSource all ride the pipe with zero gateway HTTP changes (issue #263).

scripts.test:data-plane: cargo test --locked --manifest-path data-plane/Cargo.toml && bun run test:data-plane:contract
scripts.test:data-plane:contract: bun run test:data-plane:contract:typescript && bun run test:data-plane:contract:rust
scripts.test:data-plane:contract:rust: cargo build --locked --manifest-path data-plane/Cargo.toml && cd ../.. && CENTRAID_RUN_BYTE_PLANE_CONTRACT=1 CENTRAID_BYTE_PLANE_IMPLEMENTATION=rust CENTRAID_BYTE_PLANE_BIN=packages/tunnel/data-plane/target/debug/centraid-data-plane ./node_modules/.bin/vitest run packages/gateway/src/lifecycle/byte-plane-over-http.test.ts --maxWorkers=1
scripts.lint:data-plane: cargo fmt --manifest-path data-plane/Cargo.toml --check && cargo clippy --locked --manifest-path data-plane/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
